particulars.description: 13 hill street richmond upon thames t/no.SGL520879; 15 & 17 hill street and hotham house 1 heron square richmond upon thames t/no.SGL520014; 19,21 and 23 hill street 1 bridge street hill house 2 heron square and bridgehouse 3 heron square richmond upon thames t/no.SGL520882 (for details of further properties charged please refer to form MG01) fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, book debts, uncalled capital, fixtures, plant & machinery see image for full details.
